---
title: "Figure 5"
subtitle: "Relationship between body mass and species-level responses to forest fragmentation. "
author: "Dillan Hoyt"
execute: 
  eval: true
  echo: false
  message: false
editor: visual
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
toc-title: Contents
---

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(brms)
library(tibble)
library(viridis)

meta_species_FC <- read.csv("meta_species_FC.csv")
main_model <- readRDS("m_batTraits_species.student_CF.rds")
df_obs <- main_model$data

# body-mass scaling
bm_mean <- mean(meta_species_FC$Averagemass_g, na.rm = TRUE)
bm_sd   <- sd(meta_species_FC$Averagemass_g, na.rm = TRUE)

df_obs <- df_obs %>%
  mutate(Averagemass_g = Averagemass_g_s * bm_sd + bm_mean)

# species-level estimates from model coefficients
species_effects <- NULL

coef_list <- tryCatch(coef(main_model), error = function(e) NULL)
if (!is.null(coef_list) && "Species" %in% names(coef_list)) {
  coefs_sp <- coef_list$Species
  int_name <- intersect(dimnames(coefs_sp)[[2]], c("(Intercept)", "Intercept", "Intercept "))[1]

  if (!is.na(int_name)) {
    species_effects <- tibble(
      Species = rownames(coefs_sp[, , 1]),
      Estimate = coefs_sp[, int_name, "Estimate"]
    )
  }
}

if (is.null(species_effects)) {
  post_ep <- posterior_epred(main_model, re_formula = NULL)
  obs_species <- as.character(df_obs$Species)
  species_list <- unique(obs_species)

  species_effects <- tibble(
    Species = species_list,
    Estimate = vapply(species_list, function(sp) {
      idx <- which(obs_species == sp)
      if (length(idx) == 0) return(NA_real_)
      mean(rowMeans(post_ep[, idx, drop = FALSE]))
    }, numeric(1))
  )
}

species_mass_model <- df_obs %>%
  group_by(Species) %>%
  summarise(
    Averagemass_g = mean(Averagemass_g, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_effects = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

species_effects <- species_effects %>%
  left_join(species_mass_model, by = "Species") %>%
  mutate(n_effects_cap = pmin(as.integer(n_effects), 150L))

# prediction ribbon
df_model <- main_model$data

ref_aspect <- mean(df_model$Aspect_ratio_s, na.rm = TRUE)
ref_vi     <- mean(df_model$vi, na.rm = TRUE)
ref_se     <- mean(df_model$se_obs, na.rm = TRUE)

mass_seq_s <- seq(
  min(df_model$Averagemass_g_s, na.rm = TRUE),
  max(df_model$Averagemass_g_s, na.rm = TRUE),
  length.out = 80
)

newdata <- tibble(
  Averagemass_g_s = mass_seq_s,
  Aspect_ratio_s = ref_aspect,
  vi = ref_vi,
  se_obs = ref_se,
  Conservation_status = factor(
    levels(df_model$Conservation_status)[1],
    levels = levels(df_model$Conservation_status)
  ),
  Habitat_affinity_new = factor(
    levels(df_model$Habitat_affinity_new)[1],
    levels = levels(df_model$Habitat_affinity_new)
  ),
  Diet = factor(
    levels(df_model$Diet)[1],
    levels = levels(df_model$Diet)
  )
)

post_pred <- posterior_epred(main_model, newdata = newdata, re_formula = NA)

pred_summ <- tibble(
  Averagemass_g_s = mass_seq_s,
  lnRR_mean = apply(post_pred, 2, mean),
  lnRR_lo = apply(post_pred, 2, quantile, probs = 0.025),
  lnRR_hi = apply(post_pred, 2, quantile, probs = 0.975)
) %>%
  mutate(Averagemass_g = Averagemass_g_s * bm_sd + bm_mean)

# plot
p_pub_fixed <- ggplot() +
  geom_jitter(
    data = df_obs,
    aes(x = Averagemass_g, y = lnRR),
    width = 0, height = 0.12,
    size = 1, alpha = 0.15, colour = "grey55"
  ) +
  geom_ribbon(
    data = pred_summ,
    aes(x = Averagemass_g, ymin = lnRR_lo, ymax = lnRR_hi),
    fill = "lightgrey", alpha = 0.36
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = pred_summ,
    aes(x = Averagemass_g, y = lnRR_mean),
    linewidth = 1.1
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = species_effects,
    aes(x = Averagemass_g, y = Estimate, fill = n_effects_cap),
    shape = 21, colour = "grey30", stroke = 0.45, size = 3.4, alpha = 0.95
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey40") +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(name = "No. of effect sizes", option = "viridis") +
  labs(
    x = "Body mass (g)",
    y = "lnRR (log response ratio)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position = c(0.85, 0.9),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9)
  )

print(p_pub_fixed)

ggsave(
  "Fig_5bodymass.tiff",
  p_pub_fixed,
  width = 170,
  height = 120,
  units = "mm",
  dpi = 600,
  device = "tiff",
  compression = "lzw"
)
```
